                      have h₆ : (g ≫ z : Hom c Y) ≫ f = z := by
                        calc
                          (g ≫ z : Hom c Y) ≫ f = g ≫ (z ≫ f) := by rw [assoc]
                          _ = g ≫ (z ≫ f) := rfl
                          _ = (g ≫ z) ≫ f := by rw [assoc]
                          _ = (g ≫ z : Hom c Y) ≫ f := rfl
                          _ = z := by
                            simp_all [h₅, comp_assoc]
                            <;>
                            (try simp_all [id_comp, comp_id]) <;>
                            (try simp_all [h₅, comp_assoc]) <;>
                            (try aesop)
                      exact h₆
                  <;> simp_all
        refine' ⟨_⟩
      exact h₂
      <;> simp_all
  rw [h₀]
  rw [h₁]
  <;> simp_all
  <;>
  (try simp_all [orsimp, exists_prop])
  <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Function.Surjective])
  <;>
  (try aesop)
